sourceMovie.title: After
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: After works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If After clicked for you, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If After clicked for you, Love, Simon (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after After?
faq.answer: Try Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind, Love, Simon, Match Point—each shares DNA with After while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is After?
faq.answer: After (2019) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is After part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "After Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
